trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: Staff notes dated Jan 13, 2026 state the package has been stuck in customs in Brazil for 45 days. Tracking status shows "Shipped → In Transit → Customs Hold." Order total is $101.95 with $0.00 refunded so far. Notes explicitly say international customs delays are not covered by policy and recommend escalation to the international team, with a possible partial refund or reship as goodwill.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000549 → Comments History / Notes for this Order section on the order view page.
WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims the package was never delivered, but internal notes and tracking confirm the shipment left our control and is delayed due to international customs, which is outside standard refund policy. Because policy excludes customs delays and staff already recommended escalation, this request requires escalation rather than an automatic refund approval or denial.
